docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, MIGUEL ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT ORSON DDS, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORSON DDS, EDWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. BLANCA RAMOS INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, MIGUEL ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORSON DDS, EDWARD THE TESTIMONY AND EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE IN THE TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S TEETH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO EDWARD ORSON DDS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
